on_screen_text:
English bolne me darr lagta hai? galat bol denge is darr se chinta ho rahi hai? [Are you afraid of speaking English? Worried about making mistakes?]

लीजिए Mysivi App! [Get Mysivi App!]

यहाँ AI Teacher के साथ आप जब चाहें तब बात कर सकते हैं। [Here you can talk to an AI Teacher whenever you want.]

आपकी गलतियों को यह तुरंत सुधारकर सिखाता है। [It instantly corrects your mistakes and teaches you.]

बस इतना ही नहीं, आपकी तरह ही सीख रहे दूसरे लोगों के साथ मिलकर बात करके आप Practice भी कर सकते हैं! [Not just that, you can also practice by talking with other learners like you!]

इसमें मौजूद Learning Path के ज़रिए आप अपनी English को धीरे-धीरे बेहतर बना सकते हैं। [Through the Learning Path in this, you can gradually improve your English.]

सिर्फ 1 रुपये में Trial शुरू करें! [Start trial for just 1 rupee!]

उसके बाद केवल 299 रुपये प्रति माह। आज ही Download करें! [After that only 299 rupees per month. Download today!]
summary: The ad targets the anxiety of making mistakes when speaking English, presenting the Mysivi App as the solution. It showcases features like an AI teacher for instant corrections, peer practice, and a structured learning path. It ends with a 1-rupee trial offer to drive app downloads.
